name: Charlotte Chuhlhourne
alt_names: シャルロッテ・クールホーン
description: Charlotte Chuhlhourne is a large, bulky and muscular Arrancar that dresses very feminine. His mannerisms and dress style border on those of a stereotypical drag queen. He has long wavy purple hair, large glowing lips, icy blue eyes, and curly long eyelashes. His hollow mask is a small tiara with horns. His Arrancar outfit is customised with feminine motifs.
